name: Register new Logon Process by Rubeus
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez (source), Ilyas Ochkov (rule), oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Register new Logon Process by Rubeus
SIGMA Description: Detects potential use of Rubeus via registered new trusted logon process

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4611 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%user32logonprocesss%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Register new Logon Process by Rubeus on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4611 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%user32logonprocesss%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Register new Logon Process by Rubeus

Event description: Converted from SIGMA Rule. This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
